notes.created: 2026-06-25 — initial plan + tracking scaffold, no batches run yet
notes.pickup_instructions: Read PLAN.md §6 + §8. The first batch to run is `next_batch_id` (=1). The next-batch picker must exclude any (file, index) pair already listed under a committed batch's `word_indices`.
notes.convention: word_indices keys are file basenames ('a.json' etc.). Values are integer indices into that file's top-level array.
